info.title: Microsoft Graph (subset)
info.description: Minimal OpenAPI spec for the Microsoft Graph endpoints exposed as MCP tools through AgentCore Gateway. The Gateway calls these endpoints with an OBO-exchanged token; the agent never calls Graph directly.

get.summary: Get the current user's Microsoft 365 profile
get.description: Returns the profile of the user whose token is used as the Bearer credential. With OBO, this is the originating end-user, not the gateway service identity.

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient permissions on the token
